original_image_tags: The reverse side of a manila envelope, showing four strips of yellowed tape in a cross pattern, affixed over a typed label. The envelope is aged and slightly discolored, with two punched holes at the top and a small rectangular label at the bottom edge.

elements.description: A typed label taped to an envelope flap with the text 'ENCLOSURES TO BUREAU FROM DETROIT', 'Five copies of letterhead memo.', 'Newspaper clipping from "Detroit Times" dated 3/9/60.', 'RE: UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECT; JOSEPH PERRY, Grand Blanc, Mich. - COMPLAINANT', and '(Defile 65-2677)'.

judge.reason: Both sides describe a label on an envelope flap, but Description B adds specific quoted text about enclosures and a UFO case that Description A does not mention or contradict.
